title: Indian Cinema and Bollywood
description: A film round with famous actors, films, directors, songs, and iconic moments from Indian cinema.

questions.prompt: Who directed the film Lagaan?
questions.hint: He also directed Swades and Jodhaa Akbar.

questions.prompt: Which actor played the title role in the film PK?
questions.hint: He is often called Mr. Perfectionist.

questions.prompt: Who played the role of Geet in Jab We Met?
questions.hint: She belongs to the Kapoor family.

questions.prompt: Which film features the characters Rahul, Anjali, and Tina?
questions.hint: Its title is also a famous line meaning 'something happens.'

questions.prompt: Who directed Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge?
questions.hint: He is the son of Yash Chopra.

questions.prompt: Which actor is known as the Badshah of Bollywood?
questions.hint: His initials are S. R. K.

questions.hint: Its title means 'path of fire.'

questions.prompt: Who composed the music for Roja?
questions.hint: He later won Oscars for Slumdog Millionaire.

questions.prompt: Which 1975 film is famous for the characters Jai and Veeru?
questions.hint: It also featured Gabbar Singh.

questions.prompt: Who played the role of Queen Padmini in Padmaavat?
questions.hint: She was also in Chennai Express and Piku.

questions.prompt: Which sports film starred Shah Rukh Khan as Kabir Khan?

questions.prompt: Who directed Mughal-e-Azam?

questions.prompt: Which actress is known for the song 'Ek Do Teen' from Tezaab?

questions.prompt: Who directed the film Pather Panchali?
questions.hint: He is one of India's greatest filmmakers from Bengal.

questions.prompt: Which actor played Sultan in the film Sultan?
questions.hint: He is also called Bhaijaan by fans.

questions.prompt: In which movie did Ranbir Kapoor play the character Jordan?
questions.hint: It was directed by Imtiaz Ali.

questions.hint: It starred Aamir Khan.

questions.hint: He was one of Bollywood's greatest villains.

questions.hint: He also directed Lagaan.

questions.hint: His surname is Anand.
